aiden_intro.speaker: Player
aiden_intro.text: I don't think he hears us…

aiden_intro_oh.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_oh.text: Oh, hi. Can I help you?

aiden_intro_showing.speaker: Inez
aiden_intro_showing.text: We're not shopping today, I'm just showing my friend around since they just arrived here.

aiden_intro_moved.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_moved.text: I didn't know someone new had moved into town. It's nice to meet you, my name is Aiden.

aiden_intro_help.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_help.text: If you want help getting to know anyone here, I'm happy to help. Amaranth Heights is a small town, and I grew up here, so I know pretty much everyone.

aiden_intro_back.speaker: Aiden
aiden_intro_back.text: Well, I should get back to work. See you around.

aiden_repeat.speaker: Aiden
aiden_repeat.text: Is there anything in particular you're looking for, or are you just browsing?

aiden_about_inez.speaker: Aiden
aiden_about_inez.text: Inez moved to town when I was just starting high school. She's friendly, but we haven't had the chance to speak much. She spends a lot of time near town's exit.

aiden_about_self.speaker: Aiden
aiden_about_self.text: There's not much to say. I go to university in the next town over and work here to cover the expenses. Hm… If you want to find me and I'm not working, I might be at the bar. I drink with my friend Oran pretty regularly.

aiden_day2_empty.speaker: Player
aiden_day2_empty.text: It looks like no one is here.
